basic_details.job_title: IIM Lucknow Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow (IIM Lucknow) Research Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIM Lucknow. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIM Lucknow Research Assistant Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Postgraduate degree/M.Tech. or equivalent degree from a recognised and reputed institute or university (regular mode) with a minimum of 60% marks.
qualification.details: Research Assistant: Postgraduate degree/M.Tech. or equivalent degree from a recognised and reputed institute or university (regular mode) with a minimum of 60% marks.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 40,000/- consolidated per month, plus HRA as per applicable norms
salary_details.details: Research Assistant: Rs. 40,000/- consolidated per month, plus HRA as per applicable norms

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Shortlisting of candidates Interview (online or at IIM Lucknow Campus) Selection based on qualifications
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIM Lucknow Research Assistant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 20-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIM Lucknow Research Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Research Assistant position at IIM Lucknow?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Research Assistant position at IIM Lucknow is 20-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Postgraduate degree/M.Tech. or equivalent degree from a recognized and reputed institute or university (regular mode) with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated fellowship of Rs. 40,000/- per month, along with HRA as per applicable norms.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Research Assistant position?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates need to email their applications along with necessary attachments to [email protected].

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, shortlisting of candidates, and an interview. The final selection will be based on qualifications, experience, and the outcome of the personal interaction.

faq.question: Q7. Where is IIM Lucknow located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Management Lucknow is located in Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, with the pincode 226013.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Contractual job position as a Research Assistant.

faq.question: Q9. How many vacancies are available for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Assistant post at IIM Lucknow.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should I attach with my application?
faq.answer: You should attach self-attested copies of all required documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
